---
title: 'What about 2012?'
date: '2012-01-21T10:30:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '243540920338318905'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/what-about-2012_21.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<br /><div class="clear-block" style="background-color: white; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h1 style="color: #a14c25; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">These are the prophecies from the man of God for 2012.</h1><div><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16px;"><b><br /></b></span></span></div><div><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16px;"><b>Summary:</b></span></span></div><div><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16px;"><b><br /></b></span></span></div><div><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16px;"><b>The flood gates are open and THE BLESSING is being poured out. This is a year of&nbsp;Suddenlies&nbsp;and Surprises! This is a year of GREAT WEALTH and GREAT OPPORTUNITIES! &nbsp;</b></span></span></div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;"><br /></div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;">Prophecies on KCM:</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;"><a href="http://www.kcm.org/real-help/prophecies">http://www.kcm.org/real-help/prophecies</a></div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;"><br /></div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;">See Also:</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;"><a href="http://emic.org/#">http://emic.org/#</a></div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px;"><br /></div><h1 style="color: #a14c25; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="line-height: 1.2em;">What About 2012?</span></h1><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Prophecy delivered by Kenneth Copeland</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">on November 10, 2011</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Washington, DC Victory Campaign</div></div><div class="prophecy-content real-help-content" style="background-color: white; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“What about 2012? What does it hold? What’s in store? What’s in store for the nations? What’s in store for Israel and what’s in store for the Church? I have a great storehouse. Much more has been stored up in the storehouse of riches beyond your wildest dream that I laid up for you before the foundation of the world. Much more is stored up there than what the Church has ever called for. I never have held back on the Church,” saith The LORD and the God of plenty. “I’ve made it available to you. I put it in My WORD. I gave you a promise and stood behind it with the blood, precious blood of your Savior. But there has been a backwardness in My people about laying hold of the things that I have provided for you. But I will say this: There is a people in the land. There is a people around the world. There is a people strong and mighty, growing much stronger and much mightier and more bold to lay hold and put their claim of faith on the things that I have laid up for you and it thrills Me,” saith The LORD, “because it’s been yours all the time.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“Ah, but what about 2012? 2012 is a year full of surprises. Some surprises are going to shake people up. Some surprises are going to shake people down. But for those who are listening to My voice, those who have made themselves available to My Spirit and to My WORD, you’ll have surprises. Oh, not like the world and not like a lot of carnal-minded Christians. Your surprises will come as suddenlies. Like in My WORD when it said, ‘And suddenly there came upon them.’ And you’ll stand up with a big smile on your face and say ‘I just got a suddenly, didn’t I? Oh! Yes.’ But it’ll not take you by surprise because I said in My WORD I’d show you things to come. I said in My WORD what I speak the Holy Ghost will hear and He will speak it to you. And there are those of you who are seeking My voice and seeking My WORD and seeking My Name and looking at Me in My face while I’m looking at you in your face. And together we’ll walk in this and together we’ll walk through this and there’ll come a time when you’ll just smile at Me and I’ll just smile at you and you’ll say, ‘Ha. Ha. Ha. I knew that all the time. Praise God. My Father showed me that was coming and I was all prepared and it didn’t come on me as a suddenly. But this other surprise that came on me. Oh, what joy. Oh, what thrill. Oh, what goodness. I wonder what else my Father has in store for me. Hallelujah. Praise God.’</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“2012? I’ll tell you about 2012. It’s going to be a year of great joy for those who know joy. It’ll be a time of marvelous breakthroughs. This is a time of victory. It’s a time when people begin to realize that My WORD is a living WORD, that My Spirit is the living Spirit, and that you are My voice in the earth. And your voice is the voice of victory. So rejoice and shout and understand that the breakthroughs that you’ve sought and watched over, prayed over, stood in faith for, ah, don’t turn loose now. Don’t turn loose now because they’re at hand. They’re right at hand. They’re right on top of you right now. Praise God. Hey!</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“Have no worry. Do not be in fear about the United States of America. Don’t be in fear over the failure of this republic. This is not the time for this nation to fail. I’m not done with it yet. And it may come as a surprise to many; this nation is not done with Me yet,” saith The LORD. Hallelujah.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“We have a job to do. And this year will be like none other where this nation is concerned. And many will say, ‘Oh, woe is us! Oh, woe is us!’ And you know what? Oh, woe will be them.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“And there are others who’ll say, ‘Oh, we can’t win! We can’t win!’ And to them they can’t win.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“Ah, but to those of them who say, ‘Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha. This is a time of greatness! America again! Oh, and it’s my nation and it’s God’s nation and we’re right where we’re supposed to be. He has us right where He wants us, and our future is bright because God is still LORD over the United States of America.’</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“So rejoice and give forth a glad sound because The LORD of glory is still on the throne and prayer changes things and together we’re going on to greater victory.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“Oh yes! 2012 is a time of miracles. Miracles that seemed as if they would not come but they’re here. There is an atmosphere conducive to miracles that’s been growing and growing and will manifest greatly in the first quarter of 2012 and continue throughout the year and on into 2013. I’ve been looking forward to 2012,” saith The LORD. “I know how it’s going to turn out. I’ve already dealt with it in My WORD. Your future is looking better all the time. But of course you’ll need to look at it through My eyes,” saith the Spirit of grace. “So as I said before, rejoice, for your time has come.”</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"></div><div class="clear-block" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><h1 style="color: #a14c25; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">The Flood Is On!</h1><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Prophecy delivered by Kenneth Copeland</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">on October 28, 2011</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Autumn Assembly of Prayer, Branson, MO</div></div><div class="prophecy-content real-help-content" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“Now you saw firsthand what a flood and outpouring can do when it falls on natural land and natural things. It goes into places where it never was intended to be. There’ll be water in places where nobody wanted water. And there’ll be water higher than anybody wanted to be. And the water begins to cover up all that you can see but all of the other things begin to float to the top.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“There is an outpouring of the Holy Spirit that is underway right now. Right now all over this land. The news media doesn’t know it yet, and most Christians don’t know it yet, but the flood is on. The flood is on. The flood is on. I said, ‘The Flood Is On!’ The flood has come. And My Spirit….Are you listening to Me? My Spirit is moving in places where the devil doesn’t want it to be. And My Spirit is moving into areas and getting higher and deeper than most people wanted Me to be.</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">“But you wait and see. You’ll just see all kinds of things begin to float to the surface. Praise God. You’ll see the power of The LORD begin to float to the surface and begin to bring things out in the open that the devil didn’t want anybody to see. Ah, but you wait and see what happens on the wave of that flood. For it begins to wash in as well as wash out, because when all of the junk washes out, all the good stuff washes in….And the glory of The LORD shall shine round about and the glory of The LORD will be in places that you and most other people had no idea that it would ever shine—people in foreign and funny religions with funny and really silly ideas. “But they are seeking Me,” saith The LORD, “and I am going to manifest Myself to them right in the middle of their funny meetings—right in the middle of their worshiping I don’t know what. I will manifest Myself to them. I will jubilee them into the kingdom of God and show them things that they know not of and they will be glad and you will be glad and the devil will be sad and everybody will be a thrill and a breath away from glory itself. For these are those days,” saith The LORD, “and you will see it happening because it is raining right now. It is raining right now. It is raining right now!”</div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><b><span style="color: #a14c25; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.2em;">Your Time Has Come!</span><span style="color: #a14c25; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.2em;">&nbsp;</span></b></div><div style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"></div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Prophecy delivered by Kenneth Copeland</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">on December&nbsp;31, 2011</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">Eagle Mountain International Church, Newark, TX</div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="font-size: x-small;"><br /></span></div><div style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">WHAT ABOUT 2012?</div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">It is a time of great&nbsp;</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">wealth for you, a time</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">of great opportunities.</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">Continue to stay in my</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">rest. Heaven’s release is</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">continuing to increase.</span></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">IT IS BUILDING UP. ENJOY IT!</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">IT IS WORKING!</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16px;">__________________________________</span></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;"><span style="color: #44413a; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><b><span style="line-height: 16px;">Yes Lord! I&nbsp;believe! I receive! I take it! It's mine! I have it! Thank you for it! I forgive! Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b></span></div></div></div>
